title: NEBNext Ultra II Directional RNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina Part 3: First cDNA Strand Synthesis
author: Opentrons

steps.title: This protocol is part 3 of a 10 part series
steps.instruction: This protocol is part 3 of a 10 part series. Please look at deck map and liquid legend below. This protocol adds the required reagents for the cDNA first strand synthesis

steps.title: Temperature module cools down to 4...
steps.instruction: Temperature module cools down to 4 C (this can be done manually prior to protocol start)

steps.title: 8 uL of strand specificity reagent...
steps.instruction: 8 uL of strand specificity reagent is added from the temperature module in slot 3, column 1 to all samples

steps.title: 2 uL of enzyme mix is...
steps.instruction: 2 uL of enzyme mix is added from the temperature module in slot 3, column 3 to all samples then mixed to combine

steps.title: Protocol is complete, OT-2 will flash to alert user
steps.instruction: Protocol is complete, OT-2 will flash to alert user
